news.t: BlackRock Launches Industry's First S&P 500 ex Top 100 ETF for More Precise U.S. Large-cap Exposure

holdings.infoBox: XOEF is an equity ETF with a total of 407 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 1.79%, Sandisk at 1.65%, Western Digital at 1.38%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 1.33%, and Palo Alto Networks at 1.30%.

overview.description: The iShares S&P 500 ex S&P 100 ETF (XOEF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 ex-S&P 100 Select index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index of US large-cap stocks selected by the S&P Committee. Holdings will include the S&P 500 stocks, excluding the largest 100 that have options available for trading XOEF was launched on Jul 8, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Launches Industry's First S&P 500 ex Top 100 ETF for More Precise U.S. Large-cap Exposure
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock launched the iShares S&P 500 ex Top 100 ETF (NYSE:XOEF), expanding its iShares Build ETF toolkit, which enables investors to manage their U.S. equity exposu...
